result.markdown:
--- title: "Cross-Asset VRP 현황 대시보드" format: html: code-fold: true toc: true --- 7개 자산군, **19개 자산**의 **변동성 리스크 프리미엄(VRP)** 현황을 제시합니다. ::: {.callout-note} **VRP = Implied Variance - Realized Variance** - IV 인덱스 존재 자산 (4개): VIX(SPY), VXN(QQQ), OVX(USO), GVZ(GLD) - IV 인덱스 미존재 자산 (15개): GARCH(1,1) 조건부 변동성을 IV 프록시로 사용 ::: ## 1. 최근 VRP 현황 (전 자산) ::: {#cell-vrp-bar-chart .cell fig-height='8' fig-width='14' execution_count=1} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![](vrp_dashboard_files/figure-html/vrp-bar-chart-output-1.png){#vrp-bar-chart width=1331 height=757} ::: ::: ## 2. 자산군별 VRP 추이 ::: {#cell-vrp-timeseries .cell fig-height='28' fig-width='14' execution_count=2} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![](vrp_dashboard_files/figure-html/vrp-timeseries-output-1.png){#vrp-timeseries width=1333 height=2678} ::: ::: ## 3. 자산별 VRP 요약 테이블 ::: {#vrp-summary-table .cell execution_count=3} ::: {#vrp-summary-table-1 .cell-output .cell-output-display} ```{=html}
Group Ticker Name IV Source Current RV(%) Recent VRP(%) Avg VRP(%) Signal
Equity SPY S&P 500 IV Index 1.36 +2.073 +0.731 Overpriced
Equity QQQ NASDAQ 100 IV Index 2.76 +3.272 +0.578 Overpriced
Equity IWM Russell 2000 GARCH 3.83 +1.478 -0.359 Overpriced
Equity EFA EAFE Developed GARCH 1.97 +0.589 -0.187 Overpriced
Equity EEM Emerging Mkt GARCH 3.49 +0.491 -0.253 Overpriced
Bond TLT 20Y+ Treasury GARCH 0.76 +0.519 -0.037 Overpriced
Bond IEF 7-10Y Treasury GARCH 0.17 +0.064 +0.015 Overpriced
Bond AGG US Agg Bond GARCH 0.08 +0.043 +0.032 Overpriced
Bond HYG High Yield GARCH 0.03 +0.040 +0.037 Overpriced
Grain WEAT Wheat GARCH 5.27 +1.319 -0.145 Overpriced
Grain CORN Corn GARCH 1.05 +0.148 -0.102 Overpriced
Grain SOYB Soybean GARCH 1.13 +0.585 -0.014 Overpriced
Livestock COW Livestock GARCH 0.00 +0.001 -0.019 Overpriced
Energy USO Crude Oil IV Index 13.24 +14.411 +5.416 Overpriced
Energy UNG Natural Gas GARCH 131.27 -19.886 +1.608 Underpriced
Metal GLD Gold IV Index 30.87 -10.147 +0.550 Underpriced
Metal SLV Silver GARCH 230.87 -14.127 +0.886 Underpriced
Other VNQ US Real Estate GARCH 1.93 +0.866 -0.378 Overpriced
Other UUP US Dollar GARCH 0.66 +0.031 -0.010 Overpriced
``` ::: ::: {#vrp-summary-table-2 .cell-output .cell-output-display .cell-output-markdown} **Overpriced (VRP > 0)**: 16개 | **Underpriced (VRP < 0)**: 3개 ::: ::: ::: {.callout-tip} ## VRP 해석 가이드 - **VRP > 0 (Overpriced)**: 옵션 시장이 실현될 변동성보다 높은 프리미엄 부과 → **변동성 매도(short vol)** 전략 유리 - **VRP < 0 (Underpriced)**: 실현 변동성이 내재 변동성을 초과 → **위험 회피** 또는 **변동성 매수(long vol)** 고려 - IV Index 기반 자산(SPY, QQQ, USO, GLD)의 VRP가 가장 신뢰도 높음 - GARCH 프록시 VRP는 방향성 참고용으로 활용 :::
